 {"id":"franken_networkx-e21","title":"Extract scale_free_graph parameter sum epsilon to named constant","description":"## What

Replace inline 1e-6 in fnx-generators scale_free_graph alpha+beta+gamma validation
with the named constant PARAM_SUM_EPSILON (defined as 1.0e-6).

## Status: COMPLETED (March 2026)

Line ~1214 in fnx-generators/src/lib.rs:
  Before: if (sum - 1.0).abs() > 1e-6
  After:  if (sum - 1.0).abs() > PARAM_SUM_EPSILON

## Why 1e-6 (not tighter)

This validates user-supplied parameters (alpha + beta + gamma = 1.0). Users pass
f64 values like 0.41 + 0.54 + 0.05 which may not sum to exactly 1.0 due to
representation error. 1e-6 is loose enough to accept reasonable inputs but tight
enough to catch obviously wrong parameters (e.g., forgetting to include gamma).

NetworkX uses the same tolerance: abs(alpha + beta + gamma - 1.0) >= 1e-6.

## Files Changed

- crates/fnx-generators/src/lib.rs (lines 17, ~1214)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:04:56.851146350Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-25T03:05:02.646456488Z","closed_at":"2026-03-25T03:05:02.645818911Z","close_reason":"Inline 1e-6 replaced with PARAM_SUM_EPSILON constant.  {"id":"franken_networkx-e3ri","title":"Generator parity follow-up: exact public random_unlabeled_rooted_tree API and seed adapters","description":"## Scope
This rooted-forest port added exact private rooted-tree helpers, but the public `random_unlabeled_rooted_tree` surface still does not match NetworkX semantics. Seed handling also only covers stdlib-style seeds for the new forest path.

## Goal
Bring the public rooted-tree API to parity and decide whether to mirror NetworkX's broader seed adapter behavior (notably `number_of_trees`, null-tree contract, and NumPy-backed random-state inputs).

## Files
- python/franken_networkx/__init__.py
- tests/python/test_generator_delegations_parity.py
- potentially additional generator parity tests","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-06T14:52:19.369182970Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-06T16:00:17.075403732Z","closed_at":"2026-04-06T16:00:17.075140474Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
